## PROJECT EXPERIENCE

- **AI Review Tool - Python Webapp:** Developed and deployed a full-stack, cloud-native code review automation system leveraging large language models to provide intelligent, real-time feedback on GitHub commits. Built production-ready REST API using FastAPI with JWT-based authentication and role-based access control, enabling seamless transition from single-tenant to multi-tenant SaaS architecture.
  - **Key Technologies:** Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, GitHub Webhooks, Anthropic Claude API, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, Railway
- [**Custom**](https://github.com/MyYogurt/OpenDance) **Unix Shell:** Engineered a POSIX-compliant command-line shell in C, implementing core Unix process management, I/O redirection, and command parsing capabilities from scratch using low-level system calls.
